title: Maa Annapurna Mantra
intro: Read the Annapurna Mantra with meaning. Chant this mantra with devotion to receive the grace of Mother Annapurna.
description:
Main Mantra

Om Hreem Hreem Annapurnayai Namah.

English Meaning

Om,
I bow to
Goddess Annapurna,
who blesses
all living beings
with food,
nourishment,
and prosperity.

faq.q1: When should Maa Annapurna Mantra be chanted?
faq.a1: Maa Annapurna Mantra is considered auspicious when chanted before meals, in the morning, or during Annapurna worship.
faq.q2: How many times should Maa Annapurna Mantra be chanted?
faq.a2: It is commonly chanted 11, 21, 51, or 108 times.
faq.q3: What are the benefits of chanting Maa Annapurna Mantra?
faq.a3: According to Hindu tradition, chanting this mantra is believed to bring nourishment, prosperity, contentment, and the blessings of Maa Annapurna.
faq.q4: Can Maa Annapurna Mantra be chanted daily?
faq.a4: Yes, Maa Annapurna Mantra can be chanted every day with devotion.
faq.q5: Can anyone chant Maa Annapurna Mantra?
faq.a5: Yes, anyone may chant Maa Annapurna Mantra with faith and devotion.
